{{- /* A collapsible FAQ entry: a question that expands to reveal its answer, collapsed by default. Uses native
so the answer stays in the DOM (searchable, and present in the Markdown/llms outputs) while hidden. Usage: {{< qa "Is Modelplane a serving engine?" >}} No. It is the control plane above the engine. {{< /qa >}} */ -}}
{{ .Get 0 }}
{{ .Inner | .Page.RenderString }}
